description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS/SVG, NO <canvas>) where FOUR equal-size cards slide in from off the LEFT edge, one after another (~0.5s apart), and settle into a centered horizontal row with uniform gutters. Over ~3s all four arrive and stop in their aligned row. Each card has a title and an icon box.
requirements: All visible cards stay fully within the 1920x1080 viewport at every frame (none clipped at the left edge while entering)
Cards arrive one at a time (more cards visible in later frames)
In the final frame the four cards form one centered row, equal-size, with uniform gutters
Cards never overlap each other during entry
The four cards share the same vertical center (aligned row) once settled
No horizontal or vertical scrollbar at any frame

description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS/SVG, NO <canvas>) of SIX equal-width vertical bars on a shared baseline, evenly spaced, each labeled with a value. Over ~3s they smoothly reorder by sliding horizontally into ascending height order (a few position swaps). Bars keep equal width and the shared baseline throughout.
requirements: Exactly 6 equal-width bars on one shared baseline at every frame
All bars stay fully within the viewport at every frame
Bars never overlap horizontally during the swaps (gaps preserved)
Bar positions visibly change over time (reordering occurs)
The final frame shows bars in ascending height order, evenly spaced
Each bar keeps its value label attached and legible throughout

description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS, NO <canvas>) of a horizontal tab bar with FIVE equally-spaced tab labels and a sliding underline indicator. Over ~4s the active tab cycles 1->2->3->4->5, and the underline slides to sit exactly under the active tab each time (matching its width and x-position).
requirements: Five tab labels in one evenly-spaced horizontal row, fully within the viewport at every frame
A single underline indicator is present and sits directly under exactly one tab at each settled moment
The active tab changes over time (1 through 5)
The underline's horizontal position changes over time to track the active tab
The underline stays on the tab-bar axis (never drifts above/below the row or off the sides)
The underline width matches the tab it underlines (does not overshoot into neighbors)

description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS, NO <canvas>) of toast notifications. Over ~4s, FOUR equal-width toasts slide in from the RIGHT edge one at a time and stack vertically in the top-right corner (newest on top, with uniform vertical gaps and a fixed right margin). Each toast has an icon, a title, and a close affordance.
requirements: Each toast stays fully within the viewport at every frame (none clipped at the right edge once settled)
Toasts appear one at a time (more visible in later frames)
Stacked toasts do not overlap each other
All toasts share the same right edge and width (right-aligned, equal width)
Stacked toasts have uniform vertical gaps between them
By the final frame all four toasts are visible and stacked in the top-right

description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS, NO <canvas>) of a horizontal row of FOUR equal-width cards centered on screen. Over ~3s the SECOND card smoothly expands to about double width while the third and fourth cards slide right to make room (the row stays centered as a group). All cards stay on the same row and fully on screen.
requirements: All four cards stay fully within the viewport at every frame (none pushed off the right edge)
The second card visibly widens over time
Cards never overlap each other during the push
All four cards remain on a single aligned row (shared vertical center) throughout
The third and fourth cards visibly shift right as the second expands
No scrollbar appears at any frame

description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS/JS, NO <canvas>) of a card carousel: FOUR equal-size cards in a horizontal track that slides so each card becomes centered in turn (1->2->3->4) over ~4s, the centered card slightly enlarged. Five-... four pagination dots below indicate the active card.
requirements: Exactly one card is centered at a time, and which card is centered changes over time (1->2->3->4)
The four cards stay equal-size and share the same vertical center at every frame
No card is clipped at the screen edge unexpectedly (only an intentional rounded viewport mask may clip neighbors)
Cards do not overlap each other
Exactly four pagination dots sit in one aligned, equally-spaced row and the active dot matches the centered card
No scrollbar appears at any frame

description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS/JS, NO <canvas>) of THREE equal-width columns (To Do, Doing, Done) with headers, each holding 2 static cards, plus ONE highlighted card that slides over ~3.5s from To Do to Doing to Done, settling at the bottom of each column in turn.
requirements: Three equal-width columns sharing the same top edge with uniform gutters at every frame
The highlighted card changes column over time (To Do -> Doing -> Done)
The moving card stays fully within the board and viewport at every frame
The moving card does not overlap any column header or other card during its travel
Cards within a column are equal width and aligned to their column
By the final frame the highlighted card is in the Done column

description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS, NO <canvas>) of a side drawer. A content page (a header bar plus a few aligned rows) is visible; over ~2.5s a 380px-wide drawer panel slides in from the RIGHT edge and a dim overlay fades over the rest of the page. The drawer contains a title and 4 aligned menu rows. The drawer settles flush against the right edge.
requirements: The drawer panel stays fully within the viewport at every frame (it settles flush to the right edge, not past it)
The drawer visibly slides in over time (its x-position moves leftward into view across frames)
By the final frame the drawer is fully open and its 4 menu rows are visible and left-aligned
The drawer does not overlap or clip its own menu rows (text stays inside the panel)
The underlying page content is not pushed off-screen (the drawer overlays, it does not displace content off the viewport)
No horizontal scrollbar appears at any frame

description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS/JS, NO <canvas>) of a centered 3x3 grid of NINE equal-size numbered tiles (1-9) with uniform gaps. Over ~3s, two pairs of tiles swap positions by sliding past/around each other (e.g. tile 1<->9, then 3<->7), ending in a valid 3x3 grid again.
requirements: Nine equal-size tiles arranged in a 3x3 grid with uniform gaps in the first and last frames
All nine tiles stay fully within the viewport at every frame
Tiles do not overlap each other at the start and end (a brief pass during a swap is allowed only if they do not occupy the same cell at a settled frame)
Two distinct swaps visibly occur over time (tile positions change)
The final frame is again a clean aligned 3x3 grid (rows and columns aligned)
Each tile keeps its number label centered and legible

description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS/SVG, NO <canvas>) of SIX equal-size dots orbiting a centered label at a FIXED radius, evenly spaced around the circle (60 degrees apart). Over ~4s they rotate together about the center (at least a quarter turn) while staying evenly spaced on the circle. The center label stays fixed.
requirements: Exactly 6 equal-size dots are evenly spaced (about 60 degrees apart) on a circle at every frame
All 6 dots stay fully within the viewport at every frame (none drifts off the circle or off-canvas)
The dots' angular positions change over time (they orbit)
The dots maintain a constant radius from the center (they stay on the circle, not spiraling)
No dot overlaps the center label
The center label stays fixed at the center throughout

description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS, NO <canvas>) of a 3x3 grid of NINE equal-size cards that fade-and-slide in from a small offset, staggered top-left to bottom-right over ~3s, each settling into its aligned grid cell. The final grid is perfectly aligned with equal-size cells and uniform gutters.
requirements: All cards (including mid-slide) stay fully within the viewport at every frame
Cards appear in a staggered sequence over time (more visible in later frames)
The final frame shows all 9 cards in an aligned 3x3 grid with equal-size cells and uniform gutters
Cards do not overlap each other at any frame
The three columns share vertical edges and the three rows share horizontal edges (clean grid)
Each card's content stays inside the card (no overflow)

description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS/SVG, NO <canvas>) of a horizontal pipeline of FIVE equally-spaced, equal-size stage nodes connected by segments. Over ~4s a single circular token travels left-to-right ALONG the connecting path, pausing briefly at each node (which lights up as the token arrives). The token stays on the path between node centers.
requirements: Five equal-size stage nodes in one evenly-spaced horizontal row, fully within the viewport at every frame
A single token moves left-to-right over time (its x-position increases across frames)
The token stays on the connecting path (aligned to the node row, not drifting above/below or off the ends)
Nodes light up in left-to-right order as the token reaches them
The token never leaves the viewport or runs past the last node
The five nodes stay equally spaced and aligned on one axis throughout

description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS, NO <canvas>) of a floating action button (FAB) in the BOTTOM-RIGHT corner. Over ~2s it expands into a speed-dial of FOUR equal-size sub-action buttons that fan upward in a vertical column above the FAB (each with a small label to its left), then the FAB icon rotates 45deg. All buttons must remain fully on screen near the corner.
requirements: The FAB stays anchored in the bottom-right corner, fully within the viewport, at every frame
Four equal-size sub-action buttons appear over time, fanning upward above the FAB
All four sub-buttons stay fully within the viewport (none clipped at the top or right edge)
The sub-buttons are vertically aligned in a column with uniform gaps
Sub-buttons do not overlap each other or the FAB
Each sub-button's label sits beside it without overlapping another button

description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS, NO <canvas>) of an avatar stack: FIVE equal-size circular avatars start overlapping (each offset ~20px from the previous) in the centre. Over ~3s they fan OUT into a single evenly-spaced horizontal row (no overlap), then a '+3' counter chip appears at the end.
requirements: Five equal-size circular avatars are present at every frame
All avatars stay fully within the viewport at every frame
The avatars transition from overlapping to a non-overlapping evenly-spaced row over time
In the final frame the five avatars do not overlap and have uniform spacing
A '+3' counter chip appears at the end of the row by the final frame, not overlapping the last avatar
All avatars share the same vertical center (aligned row)

description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS, NO <canvas>) of a breadcrumb trail building up. Starting from 'Home', segments append one-by-one over ~3.5s ('Home > Library > Datasets > Vision > train-2026') with a chevron separator between each. The trail stays on one left-aligned horizontal line and must not run off the right edge (it stays within a max-width container).
requirements: Breadcrumb segments append over time (more segments visible in later frames)
All segments and chevrons stay on one horizontal line (aligned, same vertical center) at every frame
The trail never runs off the right edge of the viewport (it stays within bounds, e.g. ellipsizing or wrapping inside its container)
By the final frame all five segments are present in order with chevron separators
Segments and chevrons do not overlap each other
No horizontal scrollbar appears at any frame

description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS, NO <canvas>) of a modal dialog. Over ~2.5s a dim backdrop fades in over a content page, then a centered modal card scales-and-fades up from 90% to 100%, containing a title, two lines of body text, and a right-aligned row of two buttons (Cancel, Confirm). The modal stays centered and fully on screen.
requirements: The modal card is horizontally and vertically centered and fully within the viewport once shown
The modal grows in over time (scale increases across early frames) then settles
The modal content (title, body, buttons) stays inside the modal card (no overflow)
The two buttons are right-aligned in one row inside the modal and do not overlap
A dim backdrop covers the page behind the modal in the settled frames
No scrollbar appears at any frame

description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS, NO <canvas>) of a two-pane split view (left list pane, right detail pane) with a vertical divider. Over ~3s the divider slides from 30% to 60% of the width and back, resizing both panes; each pane's content reflows to fit. Panes always fill the full width together with no gap or overlap, and content never overflows its pane.
requirements: The two panes together fill the full viewport width with no gap and no overlap at every frame
The divider's x-position changes over time (the split ratio animates)
Both panes stay fully within the viewport (nothing clipped at the screen edges)
Each pane's content stays inside that pane (no text overflow across the divider)
The divider stays vertical and spans the full height between the panes
No horizontal scrollbar appears at any frame

description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS/JS, NO <canvas>) of a row of SIX filter chips of varying widths. Over ~3s, three chips become 'selected' one at a time; each selected chip animates to the FRONT of the row (a reflow) while the others slide to make room. Chips stay on one left-aligned row with uniform gaps and within the container width.
requirements: All six chips stay on one horizontal row (aligned, same vertical center) at every frame
Chips reflow over time (their left-to-right order changes as chips are selected)
Chips never overlap each other during the reflow
All chips stay fully within the viewport / container (none pushed off the right edge)
Selected chips are visually distinct from unselected ones
Gaps between chips stay uniform once settled

description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS/JS, NO <canvas>) of a small data table (a header row plus FIVE equal-height data rows, each with 3 cells). Over ~3s the rows re-sort by a numeric column: rows slide vertically to their new positions (a few reorderings). Rows keep equal height, aligned columns, and a fixed header.
requirements: A fixed header row plus five equal-height data rows are present at every frame
Data rows visibly change vertical order over time (re-sorting occurs)
Rows never overlap each other during the reorder
All rows stay fully within the viewport (none slides off the top or bottom edge)
The three columns stay vertically aligned across all rows throughout
By the final frame the rows are in sorted order with no overlap

description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS/JS, NO <canvas>) of a vertical accordion with FOUR equal-width section headers stacked in a centered column. Over ~3.5s, sections open one at a time: opening a section expands its content panel (pushing the sections below it down) while the previously-open section collapses. Headers stay equal-width and left/right aligned; expanded content stays inside its panel.
requirements: Four equal-width section headers stay in one aligned vertical column at every frame
Exactly one section's content panel is expanded at a time, and which one changes over time
Expanded content stays inside its panel (no text overflow past the panel edges)
Sections never overlap each other (the ones below shift down as a section expands)
All sections stay fully within the viewport (the column does not push content off the bottom edge)
Section headers remain equal-width and edge-aligned throughout
